title: Briefing on the search trend "blue bombers vs redblacks"
description: Search interest is high for the matchup between the Winnipeg Blue Bombers and the Ottawa REDBLACKS, according to Google Trends data.

sources.title: Week 7: Winnipeg Blue Bombers at Ottawa REDBLACKS
Game Day HQ | Blue Bombers at RedBlacks
‘It wasn’t a fit’: Redblacks coach on sending QB Dru Brown back to Winnipeg

sections.heading: Game Coverage
paragraphs: According to CFL.ca, the matchup is titled 'Week 7: Winnipeg Blue Bombers at Ottawa REDBLACKS.' Additionally, the Winnipeg Blue Bombers released a 'Game Day HQ' update regarding the Blue Bombers at RedBlacks game.

sections.heading: Team News
paragraphs: The Winnipeg Free Press reported on comments from the Redblacks coach regarding quarterback Dru Brown. The coach stated, 'It wasn’t a fit,' in reference to sending the QB back to Winnipeg.

sections.heading: Search Data
paragraphs: Google Trends data indicates a search lower bound of 1000 for the term 'blue bombers vs redblacks' in the CA region. The trend feed was published on July 19, 2026.

faq.q: What sources are covering the game?
faq.a: CFL.ca lists the game as 'Week 7: Winnipeg Blue Bombers at Ottawa REDBLACKS,' and the Winnipeg Blue Bombers have published a 'Game Day HQ' article.

faq.q: What did the Redblacks coach say about Dru Brown?
faq.a: According to the Winnipeg Free Press, the Redblacks coach said, 'It wasn’t a fit,' regarding sending QB Dru Brown back to Winnipeg.
